JunoPersistenceFlushManager.PersistenceFlushRetryExhaustedErrorMessa: 可用重试额度耗尽，未能刷新持久性

JunoPlayerCheckpointHandler.InvalidJunoWorldErrorMessage: 尝试初始化检查点处理程序时Juno世界无效
JunoPlayerCheckpointHandler.InvalidJunoRootPlayspaceErrorMessage: 尝试初始化检查点处理程序时根游戏空间无效

JunoPlayerPersistenceHandler.PlayerCheckpointHandlerReinitializationN: 尝试在玩家持久化已初始化后再次初始化
JunoPlayerPersistenceHandler.PlayerCheckpointHandlerCreationFailedErr: 无法创建检查点处理程序

JunoPlayerPersistenceManager.DeinitializePlayerPersistenceWithInvalid: 尝试使用无效玩家ID反初始化玩家数据持久化
JunoPlayerPersistenceManager.DuplicatePlayerPersistenceInitialization: 尝试多次初始化玩家数据持久化
JunoPlayerPersistenceManager.InitializePlayerPersistenceWithInvalidId: 尝试使用无效玩家ID初始化玩家数据持久化
JunoPlayerPersistenceManager.StalePlayerPersistenceHandlerErrorMessag: 完成初始化后玩家数据持久化处理程序失效
JunoPlayerPersistenceManager.UnableToCreatePlayerPersistenceErrorMess: 无法创建玩家数据持久化处理程序
JunoPlayerPersistenceManager.InvalidPlayerPersistenceStorageErrorMess: 无法获取有效的玩家永久存储
